art_market.global_sales_outlook: Cautiously optimistic for 2026; recovery stabilizing after 2025 growth, though geopolitical and economic challenges persist.
art_market.key_trends: Continued shift toward hybrid sales models; strong interest in digital art and materiality; new collector base expanding.
art_market.recent_events: Global Art Market Report 2026 highlights moderate 4% growth in 2025; focus remains on established segments and major art hubs.

stock_market.market_sentiment: High volatility driven by geopolitical tensions in the Middle East; markets reacting sharply to potential de-escalation news.
stock_market.key_factors: Escalation/de-escalation cycle in Middle East; rising oil prices remain a significant threat; leadership rotation from mega-cap tech to broader, cyclical, and small-cap sectors.
